title: partner_schema.integration_transactions
description: Row shape for the integration_transactions view (PostgreSQL types mapped for typical node-pg / JSON output). USER-DEFINED columns are usually strings when serialized.

amount.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

unit_price.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

status.description: PostgreSQL enum / USER-DEFINED; serialized as string

type.description: PostgreSQL enum / USER-DEFINED; serialized as string

date.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)

created_at.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)

updated_at.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)

maturity_date.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)

maturity_status.description: PostgreSQL enum / USER-DEFINED; serialized as string
